system.description: Climbs as a thief of his class level: one Climbing proficiency throw per 100' (minimum one). Failure = fall from the midpoint plus completed distance, 1d6 damage per 10'. Climb at exploration speed or 1/3 combat speed without penalty; -5 at 1/2 combat speed; -10 at full. Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls.
